word: G2734 - κατοπτρίζομαι - katoptrízomai - kat-op-trid'-zom-ahee - Behold as in a glass

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Behold as in a glass
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to show in a mirror, to make to reflect, to mirror to look at oneself in a mirror

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from a compound of G2596 and a derivative of G3700 (compare G2072); to mirror oneself, that is, to see reflected (figuratively): - behold as in a glass.
